};
#ifdef __CUDA_ARCH__
alignas(16) static __device__ constexpr float LAM_BLK2_B[32] =
#else

#endif
{
    0.0209095292f, -0.0828528628f, 0.0280579645f, 0.117664896f, 0.04259637f, -0.00309927436f, -0.0130063994f, 0.0485985838f,
    -0.00817274954f, 5.58548018e-05f, -0.0111553986f, 0.048426915f, 0.0579904728f, 0.0731147975f, 0.0820668191f, 0.0556555316f,

    -0.0211604405f, 0.0100423265f, -0.0433920249f, 0.0186754633f, 0.112771079f, 0.0535783693f, 0.0606391802f, 0.113514945f,

{
    0.0070985388f, 0.013861388f, -0.0108466968f, -0.00310185924f, -0.0785178468f, -0.0757628977f, -0.00635912875f, -0.0609746426f,

    0.0453809723f, -0.0091127092f, -0.235724643f, 0.0533176623f, 0.168532997f, 0.127053738f, -0.236975193f, 0.131811753f,

template<bool ReLU>
FUNCTION_MODIFIER_INLINE void AddBlockWidth(const float* __restrict__ xin, float* __restrict__ xout, const float* __restrict__ W, const float* __restrict__ B) 
{
    float tmp[WIDTH];
    tensor::LinearRowMajor<WIDTH, WIDTH, /*bBias=*/true, /*bReLU=*/true, /*bOpt=*/true>(xin, tmp, 0, 0, W, B);
    CUDA_UNROLL
    for (int i = 0; i < WIDTH; ++i) 
    {
        xout[i] = xin[i] + tmp[i];
    }
}

FUNCTION_MODIFIER_INLINE void RGBEncode(const float* __restrict__ in3, float* __restrict__ outK) 
{
    const float inP3[3] = {sqrtf(in3[0]), sqrtf(in3[1]), sqrtf(in3[2])};                
    float h[WIDTH];
    tensor::LinearRowMajor<3, WIDTH, /*bBias=*/true, /*ReLU=*/true, /*Opt=*/true>(inP3, h, 0, 0, RGB_IN_W, RGB_IN_B);
    const float I = sqrtf(0.2126f*in3[0] + 0.7152f*in3[1] + 0.0722f*in3[2]);
    {
        float t[WIDTH];
        tensor::LinearRowMajor<WIDTH, WIDTH, /*bBias=*/true, /*bReLU=*/true, /*bOpt=*/true>(h, t, 0, 0, RGB_BLK0_W, RGB_BLK0_B); 
        CUDA_UNROLL
        for (int ii=0; ii<WIDTH; ++ii)
        {
            h[ii] = h[ii] + t[ii];
        }
    }
    {
        float t[WIDTH];
        tensor::LinearRowMajor<WIDTH, WIDTH, /*bBias=*/true, /*bReLU=*/true, /*bOpt=*/true>(h, t, 0, 0, RGB_BLK1_W, RGB_BLK1_B); 
        CUDA_UNROLL
        for (int ii=0; ii<WIDTH; ++ii)
        {
            h[ii] = h[ii] + t[ii];
        }
    }
    {
        float t[WIDTH];
        tensor::LinearRowMajor<WIDTH, WIDTH, /*bBias=*/true, /*bReLU=*/true, /*bOpt=*/true>(h, t, 0, 0, RGB_BLK2_W, RGB_BLK2_B); 
        CUDA_UNROLL
        for (int ii=0; ii<WIDTH; ++ii)
        {
            h[ii] = h[ii] + t[ii];
        }
    }
    {
        float t[WIDTH];
        tensor::LinearRowMajor<WIDTH, WIDTH, /*bBias=*/true, /*bReLU=*/true, /*bOpt=*/true>(h, t, 0, 0, RGB_BLK3_W, RGB_BLK3_B); 
        CUDA_UNROLL
        for (int ii=0; ii<WIDTH; ++ii)
        {
            h[ii] = h[ii] + t[ii];
        }
    }
    {
        float t[WIDTH];
        tensor::LinearRowMajor<WIDTH, WIDTH, /*bBias=*/true, /*bReLU=*/true, /*bOpt=*/true>(h, t, 0, 0, RGB_BLK4_W, RGB_BLK4_B); 
        CUDA_UNROLL
        for (int ii=0; ii<WIDTH; ++ii)
        {
            h[ii] = h[ii] + t[ii];
        }
    }
    {
        float t[WIDTH];
        tensor::LinearRowMajor<WIDTH, WIDTH, /*bBias=*/true, /*bReLU=*/true, /*bOpt=*/true>(h, t, 0, 0, RGB_BLK5_W, RGB_BLK5_B); 
        CUDA_UNROLL
        for (int ii=0; ii<WIDTH; ++ii)
        {
            h[ii] = h[ii] + t[ii];
        }
    }
    {
        float t[WIDTH];
        tensor::LinearRowMajor<WIDTH, WIDTH, /*bBias=*/true, /*bReLU=*/true, /*bOpt=*/true>(h, t, 0, 0, RGB_BLK6_W, RGB_BLK6_B); 
        CUDA_UNROLL
        for (int ii=0; ii<WIDTH; ++ii)
        {
            h[ii] = h[ii] + t[ii];
        }
    }
    tensor::LinearRowMajor<WIDTH, KERNEL, /*bBias=*/false, /*bReLU=*/false, /*Opt=*/true>(h, outK, 0, 0, RGB_OUT_W, nullptr);
    CUDA_UNROLL
        for (int i = 0; i < KERNEL; ++i)
        {
            outK[i] *= I;
        }
    }

FUNCTION_MODIFIER_INLINE void LambdaEncode(const float* __restrict__ in1, float* __restrict__ outK) 
{
    const float x = fminf(fmaxf((in1[0] - 360.0f) / (780.0f - 360.0f), 0.0f), 1.0f);

    float h[WIDTH];
    // sincos: h = [sin(2pix), cos(2pix), sin(4pix), cos(4pix), ...]
    {
        constexpr float TWO_PI = 6.28318530717958647692f;
        CUDA_UNROLL
        for (int k = 0; k < WIDTH/2; ++k)
        {
            const float phase = x * TWO_PI * (k + 1);
            sincosf(phase, &h[k], &h[k + WIDTH/2]);
        }
    }
    {
        float t[WIDTH];
        tensor::LinearRowMajor<WIDTH, WIDTH, /*bBias=*/true, /*bReLU=*/true, /*bOpt=*/true>(h, t, 0, 0, LAM_BLK0_W, LAM_BLK0_B); 
        CUDA_UNROLL
        for (int ii=0; ii<WIDTH; ++ii)
        {
            h[ii] = h[ii] + t[ii];
        }
    }
    {
        float t[WIDTH];
        tensor::LinearRowMajor<WIDTH, WIDTH, /*bBias=*/true, /*bReLU=*/true, /*bOpt=*/true>(h, t, 0, 0, LAM_BLK1_W, LAM_BLK1_B); 
        CUDA_UNROLL
        for (int ii=0; ii<WIDTH; ++ii)
        {
            h[ii] = h[ii] + t[ii];
        }
    }
    {
        float t[WIDTH];
        tensor::LinearRowMajor<WIDTH, WIDTH, /*bBias=*/true, /*bReLU=*/true, /*bOpt=*/true>(h, t, 0, 0, LAM_BLK2_W, LAM_BLK2_B); 
        CUDA_UNROLL
        for (int ii=0; ii<WIDTH; ++ii)
        {
            h[ii] = h[ii] + t[ii];
        }
    }
    tensor::LinearRowMajor<WIDTH, KERNEL, /*bBias=*/false, /*bReLU=*/false, /*Opt=*/true>(h, outK, 0, 0, LAM_OUT_W, nullptr);
}
    
FUNCTION_MODIFIER_INLINE float SpectralInteract(const float* __restrict__ RGBKernel, const float* __restrict__ LambdaKernel) 
{
    float acc = 0.0f;
    CUDA_UNROLL
    for (int i = 0; i < KERNEL; ++i) 
    {
        acc = fmaf(RGBKernel[i], LambdaKernel[i], acc);
    }
    // sigmoid
    //return 1.0f / (1.0f + expf(-acc));
    // softclamp01_exp
    return 1.0f - expf(-fmaxf(acc, 0.0f));
}

#ifdef __CUDA_ARCH__
alignas(16) static __device__ constexpr float gtTest[100] =
#else
alignas(16) inline constexpr float gtTest[100] =
#endif
{
    0.961231172f, 0.812282324f, 0.70040071f, 0.416227698f, 0.637013674f, 0.451213539f, 0.471957266f, 0.944817543f, 0.0776962042f, 0.0731205344f, 0.14135319f, 0.423385441f, 0.114719331f, 0.288639784f, 0.837097764f, 0.885548711f, 0.293529689f, 0.275526166f, 0.487564027f, 0.839583933f, 0.368171334f, 0.791957796f, 0.563951731f, 0.31319809f, 0.384294987f, 0.376752436f, 0.35142374f, 0.261977792f, 0.617794037f, 0.764674664f, 0.90231353f, 0.63194555f, 0.635795712f, 0.114376366f, 0.690601707f, 0.461062074f, 0.59710139f, 0.941210985f, 0.730595708f, 0.153870344f, 0.281590819f, 0.537741482f, 0.554675341f, 0.681864917f, 0.188543558f, 0.154712975f, 0.357946277f, 0.708366394f, 0.892216921f, 0.409698248f, 0.135856152f, 0.812033594f, 0.109207273f, 0.344567537f, 0.709449291f, 0.297033072f, 0.554207981f, 0.544682145f, 0.462812603f, 0.326260984f, 0.447350323f, 0.715675473f, 0.941795468f, 0.545007527f, 0.51488167f, 0.406062126f, 0.101944447f, 0.314406991f, 0.421137512f, 0.340941906f, 0.510951042f, 0.850449681f, 0.466693997f, 0.445611298f, 0.0323742032f, 0.675035536f, 0.137756526f, 0.420257092f, 0.678583145f, 0.706634402f, 0.280979276f, 0.348417461f, 0.386677325f, 0.592327476f, 0.277627885f, 0.319932699f, 0.333715498f, 0.688450575f, 0.228653073f, 0.628166676f, 0.480413973f, 0.480295122f, 0.618265986f, 0.455476224f, 0.665816545f, 0.452302635f, 0.849976897f, 0.923795342f, 0.503572464f, 0.251401067f
};

FUNCTION_MODIFIER_INLINE void SelfTestSimple()
{
    float mse = 0.0f;
    for (int i = 0; i < 100; ++i)
    {
        const float rgb3[3] = { inputTest[0][i], inputTest[1][i], inputTest[2][i] };
        const float lam1[1] = { inputTest[3][i] };

        float k1[KERNEL];
        float k2[KERNEL];

        RGBEncode(rgb3, k1);
        LambdaEncode(lam1, k2);
        const float pred = SpectralInteract(k1, k2);

        const float err = pred - gtTest[i];
        mse += err * err;

        std::printf("[test #%02d] pred=%.9f  gt=%.9f  err=%.9e\n", i, pred, gtTest[i], err);
    }
    mse /= 100.0f;    std::printf("[test] MSE=%.9e\n", mse);
}
}
